top.name: Wild Empathy

entries: A unicorn's {@action Strike||Strikes} have the effects of a {@item ghost touch} property rune.
bot.name: Ghost Touch

entries: The unicorn {@action Stride||Strides} up to double its Speed in a straight line and then makes a horn {@action Strike}. If the unicorn moved at least 20 feet, it deals an additional {@dice 2d6} damage on a hit.
bot.name: Powerful Charge

entries: 40 feet. Air in the aura is {@quickref difficult terrain||3|terrain} for Flying creatures without the {@trait air} trait.
mid.name: High Winds

entries: The uthul unleashes a powerful bolt of lightning and a stunning thunderclap. The bolt deals {@damage 6d12} electricity damage to all creatures in a 30-foot line, with a {@dc 34} basic Reflex save, and every creature in a 20-foot emanation must attempt a {@dc 34} Fortitude save. The uthul can't use Lightning Crash again for {@dice 1d4} rounds.

entries.Success: The creature is {@condition stunned 1}.
entries.Failure: The creature is {@condition stunned} for 1 round.
entries.Critical Failure: The creature is {@condition stunned} for {@dice 1d4} rounds.

bot.name: Lightning Crash

entries: An uthul's movement doesn't trigger reactions.
bot.name: Swiftness

entries: The uthul transforms itself into a swirling vortex of storm and fury 10 feet wide and up to 40 feet tall. It stays in this form for 3 rounds or until it Dismisses the effect. While in this form, the uthul gains resistance 10 to physical damage and can move through other creatures. Its aura remains active, but it can't make debris {@action Strike||Strikes} nor use Lightning Crash. Instead, any creature the uthul moves through takes {@damage 4d6} bludgeoning damage and {@damage 2d12} electricity damage. A creature can take this damage only once per round. A Large or smaller creature must also succeed at a {@dc 32} Reflex save or be picked up and held suspended within the vortex. Suspended creatures move with the uthul. A creature can attempt to escape by spending an action to attempt a {@dc 32} Reflex save (or a {@dc 32} {@skill Acrobatics} check to maneuver in flight if it has a fly Speed). Upon escaping, or when the uthul transforms back into its storm cloud form, a suspended creature is hurled {@dice 1d4} × 10 feet in a random direction, then falls unless it can fly or otherwise remain aloft. After returning to its normal form, the uthul must wait 1 minute before it can use Whirlwind Form again.
bot.name: Whirlwind Form

entries: A bat swarm can use its hearing as a precise sense at the listed range.
top.name: Echolocation

entries: Each enemy in the bat swarm's space takes {@damage 1d4} piercing damage ({@dc 16} basic Reflex save). Creatures that fail this save also take 1 {@condition persistent damage||persistent bleed damage}.
bot.name: Blood Feast

entries: Giant bat with fangs +15 for {@damage 1d8+9} piercing.
bot.name: Change Shape

entries: When Drinking Blood, the vampire regains 10 HP.
bot.name: Drink Blood

entries: Giant bat with fangs +19 for {@damage 2d8+9} piercing.
bot.name: Change Shape

bot.requirements: The vampire hasn't acted yet on this turn.
entries: The vampire expends the power stored in its signet ring. This gives the vampire the ability to cast one prepared spell it had already previously cast today, without spending a spell slot. The vampire must still {@action Cast a Spell||Cast the Spell} and meet the spell's other requirements.
bot.name: Drain Bonded Item

entries: When Drinking Blood, the vampire regains 10 HP.
bot.name: Drink Blood

entries: If another creature's reaction would disrupt the vampire mastermind's spellcasting action, the vampire attempts a DC {@flatDC 15} flat check. If the vampire succeeds, its action isn't disrupted.
bot.name: Steady Spellcasting

entries: When Drinking Blood, the spawn regains 5 HP.
bot.name: Drink Blood

entries: The vampire spawn deals {@dice 1d6} extra precision damage to {@condition flat-footed} creatures.
bot.name: Sneak Attack

attacks.name: fangs
attacks.damage: {@damage 3d8+12} piercing plus slime and consume memories

entries: 30 feet. While underwater, a vidileth exudes a cloud of transparent slime. An air-breathing creature adjacent to a vidileth must succeed at a {@dc 36} Fortitude save each round or lose the ability to breathe air but gain the ability to breathe water for 24 hours.
top.name: Mucus Cloud

entries: Once per round, a veiled master can take on the appearance of a humanoid of Large, Medium, or Small size or resume its true form. While in humanoid form, the veiled master's Speed is 30 feet, and it loses its mucus cloud aura and swim Speed. If the humanoid form assumed lacks the {@trait aquatic} trait, the veiled master loses its own {@trait aquatic} trait as well. In humanoid form, the veiled master can use weapons, or it can make {@action Strike||Strikes} that work like its tentacle attack but use the reach of its current form. If the assumed form has fangs or claws, the veiled master can also make such {@action Strike||Strikes}, but these attacks lack the veiled master's slime.
bot.name: Change Shape

entries: When a veiled master makes a fangs {@action Strike} against a creature, it can consume some of that creature's memories. The target must succeed at a {@dc 37} Fortitude saving throw or become {@condition stupefied 1}. A veiled master regains 5 Hit Points each time it successfully consumes memories. When a veiled master consumes memories, it learns some of the creature's memories (subject to the GM's discretion).
bot.name: Consume Memories

entries: When a veiled master successfully casts dominate on a creature, a {@spell suggestion} spell triggers when the {@spell dominate} spell ends. This suggestion usually causes the target to return to the veiled master, so the creature can cast {@spell dominate} again, but a veiled master can set the suggestion to different orders if it wishes.
bot.name: Delayed Suggestion

bot.note: A {@spell remove disease} spell can counteract this curse, but immunity to disease offers no protection against it.

stages.entry: the victim's skin softens, inflicting {@condition drained 1}

the victim's skin transforms into a clear, slimy membrane, inflicting {@condition drained 2} until the curse ends; every hour this membrane remains dry, the creature's drained condition increases by 1

bot.name: Slime

entries: The veiled master thrashes about with its tentacles. Make a tentacle {@action Strike} against each creature within its reach. Roll only one attack roll, and roll the damage only once for all targets.
bot.name: Tentacle Flurry

entries: A creature touched by the veiled master's tentacles, whether those tentacles deal damage or not, must attempt a {@dc 34} Will save, becoming {@condition slowed 1} on a failure or {@condition slowed 2} on a critical failure. Each time the affected creature ends its turn, its {@condition slowed} value decreases by 1.
bot.name: Thoughtlance

abilities: +2 status to all saves vs. magic

entries: The velociraptor {@action Stride||Strides} up to 10 feet, ignoring {@quickref difficult terrain||3|terrain} as it leaps over obstacles. It then makes a {@action Strike} with its talons, gaining a +1 circumstance bonus to its attack roll.
bot.name: Leaping Charge

entries: The velociraptor deals {@damage 1d4} extra damage to any creature that's within reach of at least two of the velociraptor's allies.
bot.name: Pack Attack

mid.trigger: A creature ends its movement adjacent to the viper or within the viper's space.
entries: The viper {@action Stride||Strides}, Climbs, or Swims up to 10 feet (or up to the relevant Speed, if that Speed is less than 10 feet). It must end its movement in a location that isn't within 5 feet of a foe. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.
mid.name: Slink

attacks.name: tail
attacks.damage: {@dice 1d4-1} slashing plus {@damage 1d4} chaotic and confounding lash

entries: A voidworm can anticipate the most likely presence of a creature through a supernatural insight into chaotic probabilities and chance. This grants it the ability to sense creatures within the listed range. A creature under the effects of nondetection or that is otherwise shielded from divinations and predictions cannot be noticed via entropy sense.
top.name: Entropy Sense

entries: A voidworm's vital organs shift and change shape and position constantly. Immediately after the voidworm takes acid, electricity, or sonic damage, it gains the listed amount of resistance to that damage type. This lasts for 1 hour or until the next time the protean takes damage of one of the other types (in which case its resistance changes to match that type), whichever comes first.

The voidworm is immune to {@trait polymorph} effects unless it is a willing target. If {@condition blinded} or {@condition deafened}, the voidworm automatically recovers at the end of its next turn as new sensory organs grow to replace the compromised ones.
mid.name: Protean Anatomy

entries: The voidworm takes on the appearance of a Tiny animal. This doesn't change its Speed or its attack and damage bonuses with its {@action Strike||Strikes}, but might change the damage type its {@action Strike||Strikes} deal.
bot.name: Change Shape

entries: A creature hit by the voidworm's tail {@action Strike} is {@condition stupefied 1} for 1 round ({@condition stupefied 2} on a critical hit). A successful {@dc 16} Will save negates this effect and grants temporary immunity to confounding lash for 1 minute.
bot.name: Confounding Lash

entries: If the vrock is flying and a creature triggers an attack of opportunity, the vrock can make 2 {@action Strike||Strikes} with its talons against that creature instead of 1 {@action Strike}.
mid.name: Attack of Opportunity

entries: A vrock's wrath is the heart of their essence, and forcing peace upon them wrenches at their soul. If they fail a save against calm emotions or a similar effect forcing them to be peaceful, a vrock takes {@damage 4d6} mental damage.
mid.name: Peace Vulnerability

entries: The vrock dances in flight and chants to create a ruinous explosion of electricity. If more vrocks within 30 feet want to join the dance, the vrock can delay the dance to wait for more vrocks; in that case, the effect occurs after the last vrock uses Dance of Ruin or one of the vrocks chooses to complete that round of the dance. Each non-demon creature in a 20-foot emanation from any of the dancing vrocks takes {@damage 2d12} electricity damage ({@dc 28} basic Reflex save). For each additional vrock that joins the dance, the damage increases by {@damage 1d12} and the save DC increases by 1 (to a maximum of four vrocks dealing {@dice 5d12} damage with a {@dc 31} save). The vrocks can continue dancing by using Dance of Ruin each round, for up to 3 rounds in total. The emanation's size increases by 20 feet each round, and the damage increases by {@damage 1d12} per vrock each round.
bot.name: Dance of Ruin

entries: The vrock emits a cloud of spores from their body, dealing {@damage 2d8} poison damage to all adjacent creatures. Each creature damaged this way must succeed at a {@dc 28} Fortitude save or take {@damage 2d8} {@condition persistent damage||persistent piercing damage} as the spores penetrate its skin and grow into thick, green vines. The vines cease growing after 10 rounds, and they wither away in {@dice 1d4} days if not shaved off before then. The vines can be destroyed if the creature is affected by a good spell or if holy water is applied to the vines (with an {@action Interact} action). Once the vrock uses Spore Cloud, the ability can't be used for {@dice 1d6} rounds.
bot.name: Spore Cloud

entries: The vrock emits a shrill screech. Each non-demon creature within a 30-foot burst must attempt a {@dc 28} Fortitude save. On a failure, the creature is {@condition stunned 2}, and on a critical failure, it's {@condition stunned 3}.
bot.name: Stunning Screech

abilities: +1 status to all saves vs. magic

entries: The riding pony {@action Stride||Strides} twice. It has a +10-foot circumstance bonus to its Speed during these {@action Stride||Strides}.
bot.name: Gallop

entries: The riding pony {@action Stride||Strides} twice. It has a +10-foot circumstance bonus to its Speed during these {@action Stride||Strides}.
bot.name: Gallop

mid.trigger: A creature within reach of the warg's jaws attacks one of the warg's allies.
entries: The warg makes a jaws {@action Strike} against the triggering creature.
mid.name: Avenging Bite

entries: The warg's {@action Strike||Strikes} deal {@damage 1d4} extra damage to creatures within the reach of at least two of the warg's allies.
bot.name: Pack Attack

entries: Small, {@damage 1d6+2} bludgeoning, Rupture 9.
bot.name: Swallow Whole

attacks.name: animated weapon
attacks.damage: four of the weapon's damage dice +9 of the weapon's damage type

entries: 100 feet, {@dc 35}
mid.name: Frightful Presence

bot.trigger: The warsworn moves into a {@condition dying} creature's space.
entries: The warsworn absorbs the {@condition dying} creature into itself, instantly killing the creature and healing the warsworn for a number of Hit Points equal to the creature's level. As long as the warsworn still exists, absorbed creatures can't be resurrected except by {@spell wish} or a similarly powerful effect.
bot.name: Absorb

entries: The warsworn assumes control of unattended weapons within 100 feet, forcing them to levitate around it. The warsworn can telekinetically wield these weapons to make melee {@action Strike||Strikes} with a reach of 100 feet.
bot.name: Animated Weapons

entries: When a warsworn hits with a corpse wave {@action Strike} or damages a creature with Trample, the target must succeed at a {@dc 35} Fortitude save or become {@condition drained 2} and {@condition doomed 1}. On a critical success, the target becomes temporarily immune to the warsworn's energy drain for 24 hours.
bot.name: Energy Drain

entries: A creature hit by a warsworn's scrap ball {@action Strike} must attempt a {@dc 37} Reflex save. On a failure, the target falls {@condition prone}; if the target was airborne, it falls up to 120 feet, taking damage from the fall and landing {@condition prone} if the descent brings it to the ground. On a critical failure, the target is also held under a pile of scrap ({@dc 37} to {@action Escape}).
bot.name: Plummet

entries: Huge or smaller, corpse wave, {@dc 37}
bot.name: Trample

entries: Each enemy in the swarm's space takes {@damage 2d8} piercing damage ({@dc 21} basic Reflex save) and is exposed to wasp venom. A successful save negates the poison exposure.
bot.name: Swarming Stings

entries: The water mephit breathes acid in a 15-foot cone that deals {@damage 2d6} acid damage to each creature within the area ({@dc 17} basic Reflex save). The water mephit can't use Breath Weapon again for {@dice 1d4} rounds.
bot.name: Breath Weapon

entries: The water mephit puts out all fires in a 5-foot emanation. The mephit extinguishes all non-magical fires automatically and attempts to {@quickref counteract||3|counteracting} magical fires (+7 counteract modifier).
bot.name: Drench

entries: The web lurker can speak with spiders, with the same effects and limitations as speak with animals.
top.name: Spider Speak

mid.trigger: A creature touches the web lurker's web while the web lurker is on it.
entries: Requirement Initiative has not yet been rolled. The web lurker automatically notices the creature and {@action Stride||Strides} or Climbs before rolling initiative.
mid.name: Spring upon Prey

entries: A creature hit by the web lurker's web attack is {@condition immobilized} and stuck to the nearest surface until it succeeds at {@dc 20} {@skill Acrobatics} check to {@action Escape}.
bot.name: Web Trap

bot.trigger: The wemmuth deals damage to a creature with Constrict.
entries: The wemmuth heals a number of Hit Points equal to half the total damage dealt by Constrict.
bot.name: Blood Leech

entries: {@dc 37}, {@damage 4d8} bludgeoning, {@action Escape} {@dc 35}, Rupture 36.
bot.name: Engulf

entries: Whenever a creature within 10 feet attempts a melee attack against a wemmuth or uses {@skill Acrobatics} to {@action Tumble Through} its space, that creature takes {@damage 1d12+10} piercing damage.
bot.name: Thorny Mass

entries: Heatsight is a precise sense that sees heat signatures.
top.name: Heatsight

entries: A target that fails its save against the wendigo's nightmare is exposed to wendigo torment.
bot.name: Dream Haunting

entries: The wendigo unleashes a forlorn howl that can be heard up to 1 mile away. Any creature that hears the howl must succeed at a {@dc 38} Will save or be {@condition frightened 1}. Any creature that critically fails and is within 120 feet of the wendigo is instead {@condition frightened 3}, and is also {@condition fleeing} for {@dice 1d4} rounds (or until it's no longer {@condition frightened}, whichever comes first). A creature {@condition frightened} by a wendigo's howl still naturally recovers from its fright but can't reduce it below {@condition frightened 1} in this way until 1 hour has passed or magic is used. Whether it succeeds or fails its save, a creature is then temporarily immune to that wendigo's Howl for 24 hours.
bot.name: Howl

bot.trigger: The wendigo casts wind walk while it has {@condition Grabbed} a foe.
entries: The wendigo attempts to turn the {@condition grabbed} creature into wind and carry it along as part of the action. If the target succeeds at a {@dc 38} Will save, it prevents itself from being transformed; in this case, the wendigo still transforms, automatically releasing the victim. A creature forced to Ride the Wind along with the wendigo is exposed to wendigo torment. The target can attempt a new Will save each round to return to normal, though it immediately becomes corporeal and begins falling if it succeeds.
bot.name: Ride the Wind
Wendigo Torment
bot.note: A creature affected by wendigo torment can't recover beyond stage 1 until it has been restored to full HP.

stages.entry: The creature searches for an individual of its own ancestry to kill and devour.

abilities: +1 status to all saves vs. magic

attacks.name: jaws
attacks.damage: {@damage 1d12+7} piercing plus curse of the werebear

entries: The werebear can communicate with ursines.
top.name: Bear Empathy

entries: Medium human with fist +13 for {@damage 1d4+7} bludgeoning, or grizzly bear with Speed 35 feet.
bot.name: Change Shape

entries: {@b Saving Throw} {@dc 22} Fortitude.
bot.name: Curse of the Werebear

bot.requirements: The werebear can see or hear the target or is {@action Track||Tracking} it in exploration mode.
entries: The werebear gains a +2 circumstance bonus to {@skill Perception} checks when it Seeks its prey and a +2 circumstance bonus to {@skill Survival} checks when it Tracks its prey. The werebear also ignores the penalty for making ranged attacks within its second range increment against the prey it's hunting. The werebear can designate only one creature as its hunted prey at a time. If it uses {@action Hunt Prey} against a different creature, the prior creature loses the designation and the new prey gains the designation. In any case, this designation lasts until the werebear's next daily preparation.
bot.name: Hunt Prey

entries: The werebear gains a +2 circumstance bonus to damage rolls against creatures it has {@condition grabbed}.
bot.name: Mauler

entries: The werebear deals {@dice 1d8} additional precision damage on its first successful {@action Strike} against its hunted target on each of its turns.
bot.name: Precision Edge

attacks.name: jaws
attacks.damage: {@damage 1d8+2} piercing plus curse of the wererat

entries: The wererat can communicate with rodents.
top.name: Rat Empathy

mid.trigger: The wererat is targeted with a melee or ranged attack by an attacker it can see.
entries: The wererat gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.
mid.name: Nimble Dodge

entries: Human with fist +10 for {@damage 1d4+2} bludgeoning, or Small rat with Speed 30 feet, climb 10 feet.
bot.name: Change Shape

entries: {@b Saving Throw} {@dc 18} Fortitude.
bot.title: Curse of the Wererat
bot.name: Curse of the Werecreature

entries: The wererat deals {@dice 1d6} extra precision damage to {@condition flat-footed} creatures.
bot.name: Sneak Attack

attacks.name: jaws
attacks.damage: {@damage 1d8+8} piercing plus curse of the werewolf

entries: The werewolf can communicate with lupines.
top.name: Wolf Empathy

entries: Human with fist +11 for {@damage 1d4+8} bludgeoning, or wolf with Speed 40 feet and jaws with Knockdown.
bot.name: Change Shape

entries: {@b Saving Throw} {@dc 19} Fortitude.
bot.name: Curse of the Werewolf

entries: When a full moon appears in the night sky, the werewolf must enter hybrid form, can't Change Shape thereafter, becomes one size larger, increases its reach by 5 feet, and increases the damage of its jaws by 2. When the moon sets or the sun rises, the werewolf returns to humanoid form and is fatigued for {@dice 2d4} hours.
bot.name: Moon Frenzy

entries: The werewolf's {@action Strike||Strikes} deal {@damage 1d6} extra damage to creatures within reach of at least two of the werewolf's allies.
bot.name: Pack Attack

mid.trigger: The wight is reduced to 0 Hit Points.
entries: The wight makes a {@action Strike} before being destroyed. It doesn't gain any temporary HP from drain life on this {@action Strike}.
mid.name: Final Spite

entries: When the wight damages a living creature with its claw {@action Strike}, the wight gains 3 temporary Hit Points and the creature must succeed at a {@dc 17} Fortitude save or become {@condition drained 1}. Further damage dealt by the wraith increases the amount of drain by 1 on a failed save to a maximum of {@condition drained 4}.
bot.name: Drain Life

entries: A living humanoid slain by a wight's claw {@action Strike} rises as a wight after {@dice 1d4} rounds. This wight spawn is under the command of the wight that killed it. It doesn't have Drain Life or Wight Spawn and becomes {@condition clumsy 2} for as long as it is a wight spawn. If the creator of the wight spawn dies, the wight spawn becomes a full-fledged, autonomous wight; it regains its free will, gains Drain Life and Wight Spawn, and is no longer {@condition clumsy}.
bot.name: Wight Spawn

entries: 20 feet. A will-o'-wisp is itself naturally {@condition invisible}, but glows with a colored light, casting bright light in the aura and making it visible.
mid.name: Glow

entries: A will-o'-wisp is immune to all spells except faerie fire, glitterdust, magic missile, and maze.
mid.name: Magic Immunity

bot.requirements: An enemy is under a {@trait fear} effect or {@condition dying} within 15 feet of the will-o'-wisp.
entries: The will-o'-wisp feeds on the creature's terror. It regains {@dice 2d4} Hit Points, and if it has Gone Dark, its glow reignites. A will-o'-wisp can take this action only once per round.
bot.name: Feed on Fear

entries: The will-o'-wisp extinguishes its glow, becoming {@condition invisible}. It can end this effect with another use of this action. If it uses its shock attack while {@condition invisible}, the arc of electricity lets any observer determine its location, making the will-o'-wisp only {@condition hidden} to all observers until it moves.
bot.name: Go Dark

entries: The warg makes a jaws {@action Strike} against the triggering creature.
mid.name: Avenging Bite
mid.trigger: A creature within reach of the warg's jaws attacks one of the warg's allies.

entries: The winter wolf breathes a cloud of frost in a 15-foot cone that deals {@damage 5d8} cold damage ({@dc 23} basic Reflex save). The winter wolf can't use Breath Weapon again for {@dice 1d4} rounds.
bot.name: Breath Weapon

entries: The winter wolf's {@action Strike||Strikes} deal {@damage 1d6} extra damage to creatures within the reach of at least two of the winter wolf's allies.
bot.name: Pack Attack

entries: The wolf's {@action Strike||Strikes} deal {@damage 1d4} extra damage to creatures within reach of at least two of the wolf's allies.
bot.name: Pack Attack

entries: Wraiths sense the vital essence of living and undead creatures within the listed range.
top.name: Lifesense

entries: A wraith caught in sunlight is {@condition stunned 2} and {@condition clumsy 2}.
mid.name: Sunlight Powerlessness

entries: When the wraith damages a living creature with its spectral hand {@action Strike}, the wraith gains 5 temporary Hit Points and the creature must succeed at a {@dc 23} Fortitude save or become {@condition drained 1}. Further damage dealt by the wraith increases the amount of drain by 1 on a failed save to a maximum of {@condition drained 4}.
bot.name: Drain Life

entries: A living humanoid slain by a wraith's spectral hand {@action Strike} rises as a wraith spawn after {@dice 1d4} rounds. This wraith spawn is under the command of the wraith that killed it. It doesn't have drain life or wraith spawn and becomes {@condition clumsy 2} for as long as it is a wraith spawn. If the creator of the wraith spawn dies, the wraith spawn becomes a full-fledged, autonomous wraith; it regains its free will, gains Wraith Spawn, and is no longer {@condition clumsy}.
bot.name: Wraith Spawn

resistances.name: all
resistances.note: except force, {@item ghost touch}, or positive; double resistance vs. non-magical

mid.trigger: A creature {@condition grabbed} by the wyvern critically fails a skill check to {@action Escape}.
entries: The wyvern makes a stinger {@action Strike} against the triggering creature.
mid.name: Savage

entries: The wyvern Flies up to its fly Speed and must both move forward at least 20 feet and descend at least 10 feet. If it ends the movement within melee reach of at least one enemy its size or smaller, it can make a claw {@action Strike} against that enemy. If the claw hits, as a free action the wyvern can either automatically Grab the target or knock it {@condition prone}.
bot.name: Powerful Dive

bot.requirements: The wyvern {@condition grabbed} a creature this turn using Powerful Dive.
entries: The wyvern can {@action Fly} at half Speed while holding the creature in its claws, carrying that creature along with it and dropping it at the end of its movement. Alternatively, the wyvern can {@action Strike} the creature with its stinger with a +2 circumstance bonus.
bot.name: Punishing Momentum

entries: The xorn makes three claw {@action Strike||Strikes}; no more than two can be against the same target. These attacks count toward the xorn's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until after all the attacks have been made.
bot.name: Claw Frenzy

entries: The xorn can {@action Burrow} through any earthen matter, including rock. When it does so, the xorn moves at its full burrow Speed, leaving no tunnels or signs of its passing.
bot.name: Earth Glide

entries: 30 feet. A creature that enters the area must attempt a {@dc 19} Fortitude save. On a failure, the creature is {@condition sickened 1}, and on a critical failure, the creature also takes a –5-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. While within the aura, the creature takes a –2 circumstance penalty to saves to recover from the {@condition sickened} condition. A creature that succeeds at its save is temporarily immune to all xulgaths' stenches for 1 minute.
mid.name: Stench

entries: The target must succeed at a {@dc 20} Fortitude save or become {@condition enfeebled 1} (or {@condition enfeebled 2} on a critical hit) for 1 round.

Lone exiles of yeti clans have little use for treasure and leave the gear of their slain victims behind where it is quickly covered by snowfall. Clan-based yetis, on the other hand, create beautifully carved stonework, some of which they shape into protective talismans of rare beauty.
bot.name: Weakening Strike

entries: 30 feet. A creature that enters the area must attempt a {@dc 16} Fortitude save. On a failure, the creature is {@condition sickened 1}, and on a critical failure, the creature also takes a –5-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. While within the aura, the creature takes a –2 circumstance penalty to saves to recover from the {@condition sickened} condition. A creature that succeeds at its save is temporarily immune to all xulgaths' stenches for 1 minute.
mid.name: Stench

entries: A xulgath skulker can suppress its stench aura as a free action to better hide its presence. The skulker can resume its stench aura as a free action.
mid.name: Stench Suppression

entries: If a xulgath skulker starts its turn {@condition undetected} by a creature or merely {@condition hidden} from it, that creature is {@condition flat-footed} against the skulker's attacks until the end of the skulker's turn.
bot.name: Hidden Movement

entries: A xulgath skulker deals an additional {@damage 1d6} precision damage to {@condition flat-footed} creatures.
bot.name: Sneak Attack

entries: 30 feet. A creature that enters the area must attempt a {@dc 16} Fortitude save. On a failure, the creature is {@condition sickened 1}, and on a critical failure, the creature also takes a –5-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. While within the aura, the creature takes a –2 circumstance penalty to saves to recover from the {@condition sickened} condition. A creature that succeeds at its save is temporarily immune to all xulgaths' stenches for 1 minute.
mid.name: Stench

entries: Hiding, the yeti is {@condition concealed} by any snowfall, even if it's not thick enough to make other creatures {@condition concealed}.
top.name: Snowblind When

entries: Yetis gain a +4 status bonus to saves against fear and against spells and abilities that affect dreams. A yeti that falls prey to a supernatural nightmare loses this ability and becomes permanently enraged, gaining a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls and a –1 status penalty to AC.
mid.name: Nightmare Guardian

mid.trigger: The yeti is {@condition hidden} or {@condition undetected} while not in combat, and a creature would observe it.
entries: The yeti {@action Stride||Strides} or Climbs up to half its Speed to a location where it can {@action Hide}, then Hides. If its new {@skill Stealth} check result meets or exceeds the triggering creature's {@skill Perception} DC, the yeti remains {@condition hidden}.
mid.name: Vanish

bot.trigger: The yeti hits a creature in the first round of combat and the yeti was {@condition hidden} from that creature at the start of combat.
entries: Each enemy within 30 feet that witnesses the attack (including the target of the attack) must attempt a {@dc 23} Will save. On a failure, the creature is {@condition frightened 2}; on a critical failure, it's {@condition frightened 4}.
bot.name: Grisly Arrival

bot.name: Ice Climb

entries: The dragon slams into the ground. It can do this if it's on the ground or Flying within 10 feet of the ground. Each creature on the ground within 10 feet must succeed at a {@dc 24} Reflex save or fall {@condition prone} and take {@damage 2d6} bludgeoning damage. The dragon can then {@action Step}.
bot.name: Ground Slam

entries: The dragon reshapes a cube of ice or snow it touches, up to 10 feet across. Any creature standing atop the ice must succeed at a {@dc 15} Reflex save or {@skill Acrobatics} check. On a failure, the creature falls {@condition prone} atop the ice; on a critical failure, it falls off the ice entirely and is also {@condition prone}.
bot.name: Shape Ice

entries: Until the next time it acts, the zaramuun appears to be a sand dune. It has an automatic result of 47 (50 in sandy terrain) on {@skill Deception} and {@skill Stealth} checks and DCs to pass as a sand dune. Any creature that walks onto the zaramuun moves into its body and is Engulfed.
bot.name: Dune

entries: {@dc 35}, {@damage 4d12} bludgeoning damage and dimensional anchor, {@action Escape} {@dc 32}, Rupture 28.
bot.name: Engulf

bot.requirements: The zaramuun hit with a melee {@action Strike} with its last action, or it has a creature Engulfed.
entries: The zaramuun attempts to {@action Disarm} one primarily metal or stone object from the Struck or Engulfed creature and casts its innate dimensional anchor on the target creature.
bot.name: Raking Sand

entries: The zaramuun can {@action Burrow} through sand and dirt (but not stone) at its full burrow Speed, leaving no tunnel or sign of its passing. Any Engulfed creatures are left behind when it Burrows. Loose sand and scree are not {@quickref difficult terrain||3|terrain} for a zaramuun.
bot.name: Sand Glide

entries: The zaramuun sprays a blast of sand that deals {@damage 11d10} slashing damage to all creatures in a 60-foot line (Reflex {@dc 38}). It can't Sandblast again for {@dice 1d4} rounds.

entries.Success: Half damage.
entries.Failure: Full damage.
entries.Critical Failure: Full damage and {@condition blinded} for 1 round.

bot.name: Sandblast

entries: The zephyr hawk Flies up to half its Speed, makes two wing {@action Strike||Strikes}, then Flies up to half its Speed again to return to its original location. The second half of this movement doesn't trigger reactions. Both attacks count toward the zephyr hawk's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until after it makes both attacks.
bot.name: Circling Attack

entries: A zombie hulk can throw corpses at foes. While any Medium dead body will do, they sometimes throw {@creature zombie shambler|b1|zombie shamblers}, who take just as much damage from being thrown as the target they hit. A thrown shambler lands {@condition prone}, but if it's not destroyed, it can rise and use other actions normally.
bot.name: Corpse Throwing

entries: The zombie hulk makes a hunk of meat {@action Strike} and compares the attack roll result to the AC of up to two foes, each of whom must be within the {@action Strike}'s reach. This attack counts as two attacks for the zombie hulk's multiple attack penalty.

A creature unable to act due to the {@condition slowed} condition from Crystallize Flesh is {@condition petrified} permanently, transforming into a crystalline statue. The effect ends if the creature is {@condition petrified} or the {@condition slowed} condition is removed.

entries: The dragon recharges their Breath Weapon whenever they score a critical hit with a {@action Strike}.
bot.name: Draconic Momentum

entries: An umbral dragon's {@action Strike||Strikes} affect incorporeal creatures with the effects of a {@item ghost touch} property rune, and an umbral dragon's jaws deal an additional {@damage 6d6} force damage to undead.
bot.name: Ghost Bane

entries: An ahuizotl can mimic the sounds of a person in distress by attempting a {@skill Deception} check to {@action Lie}.
The ahuizotl has a +4 circumstance bonus to this check.
top.name: Voice Imitation

bot.requirements: The ahuizotl has a Medium or smaller creature {@condition grabbed} with its tail claw
entries: The ahuizotl attempts an {@skill Athletics} check against the creature's Fortitude DC.

entries.Critical Success: If the creature is 10 feet away from the ahuizotl, it is dragged into a square adjacent to the ahuizotl. The ahuizotl can make a jaws {@action Strike} against the creature.
entries.Success: If the creature is 10 feet away from the ahuizotl, it is dragged into a square adjacent to the ahuizotl.
entries.Failure: The creature is not dragged.
entries.Critical Failure: The creature is not dragged and the ahuizotl no longer has the creature {@condition grabbed}.

bot.name: Tail Drag

entries: After 3 or more days without eating, an akata can secrete resin that encases it in a noqual cocoon. The cocoon has Hardness 9, 40 HP, and a Broken Threshold of 18. It has resistance 5 to damage from magical sources. As long as the cocoon remains intact, the akata can't be harmed, and it doesn't need to eat or drink. While inside the cocoon, the akata gains lifesense 30 feet. The akata remains in a state of hibernation until it is exposed to extreme heat or senses a living creature, at which point it can burst free of its cocoon in {@dice 1d4} minutes.
top.name: Hibernation

entries: An akata has no auditory senses. It is immune to {@trait auditory} effects, automatically critically fails {@skill Perception} checks that require it to hear, and takes a –2 status penalty to {@skill Perception} checks (but not initiative rolls) that involve sound but also rely on other senses.
top.name: No Hearing

entries: An akata doesn't breathe and is immune to effects that require breathing (such as an inhaled poison).
mid.name: No Breath

entries: Salt water acts as an extremely strong acid to an akata. Full immersion in salt water deals {@damage 4d6} acid damage per round.
mid.name: Salt Water Vulnerability

bot.name: Void Death
bot.note: An akata implants its parasitic larval young into any creature it bites, but only Medium or Small humanoids make suitable hosts; all other creatures are immune to this disease

stages.entry: dead and corpse rises as a void zombie

attacks.name: jaws
attacks.damage: {@damage 2d8+3} piercing plus {@damage 1d4} chaotic and garbled thoughts

entries: An akizendri can anticipate the most likely location of a creature through their supernatural insight into the forces of chaotic probabilities and chance. This grants the akizendri the ability to sense creatures within the listed range. A creature under the effects of nondetection or that is otherwise shielded from divinations and predictions cannot be noticed via entropy sense.
top.name: Entropy Sense

entries: An akizendri's vital organs shift and change shape and position constantly. Immediately after the akizendri takes acid, electricity, or sonic damage, it gains the listed amount of resistance to that damage type. This lasts for 1 hour or until the next time the protean takes damage of one of the other types (in which case its resistance changes to match that type), whichever comes first.

The akizendri is immune to {@trait polymorph} effects unless it is a willing target. If {@condition blinded} or {@condition deafened}, the akizendri automatically recovers at the end of its next turn as new sensory organs grow to replace the compromised ones.
mid.name: Protean Anatomy

entries: The akizendri takes on the appearance of any Small or smaller creature. This doesn't change its Speed or its attack and damage bonuses with its {@action Strike||Strikes}, but might change the damage type its {@action Strike||Strikes} deal.
bot.name: Change Shape

entries: {@damage 1d8+3} bludgeoning, {@dc 20}
bot.name: Constrict

entries: A creature hit by the akizendri's bite {@action Strike} must attempt a {@dc 20} Will save.

entries.Success: The creature is unaffected.
entries.Failure: The creature is {@condition stupefied 1} for {@dice 1d4} rounds.
entries.Critical Failure: As failure, but the creature is also {@condition confused} for 1 round.

bot.name: Garbled Thoughts

entries: When the akizendri casts secret page, it can physically immerse itself in the text, changing the message of the text in the process. It can exit the book at any point by Dismissing secret page, at which point it appears in a space adjacent to the text. If it does so to begin combat, it rolls a {@skill Deception} check for initiative. As long as it remains immersed in the text, the akizendri has no body. It can communicate telepathically with a creature as long as the creature touches the book or scroll that contains the secret page. It can sense nearby creatures using its entropy sense, but not in any other way, nor can it use any attack, manipulate, or move actions or speak aloud. If the object it is immersed in is destroyed, the akizendri reappears in an adjacent square and is {@condition stunned 1}.
bot.name: Text Immersion

entries: An amoeba swarm can sense nearby creatures through vibration and air or water movement.
top.name: Motion Sense

entries: The amoeba swarm slithers over each creature in its space, dealing {@damage 1d6} acid damage ({@dc 14} basic Reflex save). A creature that critically fails is {@condition sickened 1}.
bot.name: Swarming Slither

entries: An amoeba's acid damages only organic material—not metal, stone, or other inorganic substances.
bot.name: Weak Acid

entries: Large or smaller, foot, {@dc 25}
bot.name: Trample

entries: The anancus sweeps its long tusks back and forth, dealing {@damage 4d6} bludgeoning damage to all creatures in a 15-foot cone, who must make a {@dc 27} basic Reflex save.
bot.name: Tusk Sweep

entries: 90 feet, {@dc 36}
mid.name: Frightful Presence

entries: The dragon spits a glob of caustic salt water at the creature. The creature takes {@damage 7d6} acid damage ({@dc 36} basic Reflex save). On a failure, the concentrate action is disrupted.
mid.name: Brine Spit
mid.trigger: A creature the brine dragon observes within 30 feet uses a concentrate action

entries: The dragon breathes a spray of acidic salt water that deals {@damage 18d6} acid damage in a 120-foot line ({@dc 38} basic Reflex save). They can't use Breath Weapon again for {@dice 1d4} rounds.
bot.name: Breath Weapon

entries: The dragon tries to capsize an adjacent aquatic vessel of their size or smaller. They must succeed at an {@skill Athletics} check with a DC of 35 (reduced by 5 for each size smaller the vessel is than the dragon) or the pilot's {@skill Lore||Sailing Lore} DC, whichever is higher.
bot.name: Capsize

entries: The dragon makes a jaws {@action Strike}. On a hit, the target takes {@damage 6d6} {@condition persistent damage||persistent acid damage}, and is {@condition sickened 3} from the pain of salt and brine in its wounds.
bot.name: Desiccating Bite

entries: The dragon makes two claw {@action Strike||Strikes} and one wing {@action Strike} in any order.
bot.name: Draconic Frenzy

entries: The dragon recharges their Breath Weapon whenever they score a critical hit with a {@action Strike}.
bot.name: Draconic Momentum

entries: The brine dragon's body is encrusted with salty, acidic crystals.

When a target takes damage from one of the dragon's melee {@action Strike||Strikes}, it must succeed at a {@dc 38} Fortitude Save or be {@condition stunned 1} ({@condition stunned 3} on a critical failure). The target then becomes temporarily immune for 1 minute.
bot.name: Painful Strikes

attacks.name: jaws
attacks.damage: {@damage 3d10+17} piercing plus {@damage 2d12} electricity, {@damage 4d6} sonic, and thundering bite

entries: Fog and mist don't impair a cloud dragon's vision; they ignore the {@condition concealed} condition from fog and mist.
top.name: Mist Vision

entries: 90 feet, {@dc 40}
mid.name: Frightful Presence

entries: The cloud dragon flexes a wing and creates a billowing cloud of mist. The dragon is treated as if they were {@condition hidden} for the purposes of resolving the triggering attack, so normally the attacker must succeed at a DC {@flatDC 11} flat check to target them. The dragon also gains a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.
mid.name: Deflecting Cloud
mid.trigger: The dragon is the target of a ranged attack
mid.requirements: The dragon is aware of the attack and has a free wing

entries: The dragon breathes a thundercloud that deals {@damage 20d6} electricity damage in a 60-foot cone ({@dc 41} basic Reflex save). This cloud remains in the area for {@dice 1d4} rounds, with the effects of obscuring mist. A creature that ends its turn inside of the cloud takes {@damage 10d6} electricity damage ({@dc 41} basic Reflex save). The cloud dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for {@dice 1d4} rounds.
bot.name: Breath Weapon

entries: The cloud dragon's body becomes vaporous and misty. They gain the effects of gaseous form, except their fly Speed remains unchanged. The cloud dragon can use this action again to return to physical form.
bot.name: Cloud Form

entries: The cloud dragon can tread on clouds or fog as though on solid ground.
bot.name: Cloud Walk

entries: The dragon makes two claw {@action Strike||Strikes} and one horn {@action Strike} in any order.
bot.name: Draconic Frenzy

entries: The dragon recharges their Breath Weapon whenever they score a critical hit with a {@action Strike}.
bot.name: Draconic Momentum

entries: An ancient cloud dragon's jaws {@action Strike} creates a deafening clap of thunder when it damages a foe. A creature that takes damage from the dragon's jaws {@action Strike} must succeed at a {@dc 41} Fortitude save or be {@condition deafened} for 1 minute (or permanently on a critical failure).
bot.name: Thundering Bite

entries: The dragon gains 2 reactions at the start of each of their turns.
mid.name: Extra Reaction

entries: 90 feet, {@dc 37}
mid.name: Frightful Presence

entries: 30 feet. A swirling vortex of reflected color and light shimmers around the crystal dragon. Creatures in this aura's emanation are {@condition dazzled}. Each creature that ends its turn in the emanation must succeed at a {@dc 34} Will saving throw or be {@condition stunned 1} (or {@condition stunned 3} on a critical failure). Once a creature succeeds at this save, it is temporarily immune to the stunning effect for 1 minute. The crystal dragon can turn this aura on or off using a single action, which has the {@trait concentrate} trait, and it can choose not to affect allies.
mid.name: Scintillating Aura

mid.trigger: The crystal dragon is targeted by a ranged spell attack roll
entries: The crystal dragon adjusts a wing to try to reflect the spell and gains a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If the attack misses, the spell is reflected back at the caster, who must roll a second ranged spell attack roll against their own AC to determine if the spell hits them instead.
mid.name: Reflect Spell

entries: The dragon makes a tail {@action Strike} at the creature with a –2 penalty. If it hits, the dragon disrupts the creature's action.
mid.name: Twisting Tail
mid.trigger: A creature within reach of the dragon's tail uses a move action or leaves a square during a move action it's using

entries: The dragon breathes a flurry of piercing crystals that deals {@damage 17d6} piercing damage in a 50-foot cone ({@dc 38} basic Reflex save)
They can't use Breath Weapon again for {@dice 1d4} rounds.
bot.name: Breath Weapon

bot.trigger: The crystal dragon damages a creature made of flesh with a jaws {@action Strike}
entries: The dragon embeds transformative crystals in the creature's flesh. The creature must attempt a {@dc 37} Fortitude save.

entries.Success: The target is {@condition slowed 1} for 1 round as portions of its flesh turn crystalline.
entries.Failure: The target is {@condition slowed 1} and must attempt a Fortitude save at the end of each of its turns; this ongoing save has the {@trait incapacitation} trait. On a failed save, the {@condition slowed} condition value increases by 1 (or by 2 on a critical failure). A successful save reduces the {@condition slowed} condition value by 1. A creature unable to act due to the {@condition slowed} condition from Crystallize Flesh is {@condition petrified} permanently, transforming into a crystalline statue. The effect ends if the creature is {@condition petrified} or the {@condition slowed} condition is removed.
entries.Critical Failure: As failure, but the target is initially {@condition slowed 2}.

bot.name: Crystallize Flesh

entries: The dragon makes two claw {@action Strike||Strikes} and one tail {@action Strike} in any order.
bot.name: Draconic Frenzy

entries: The dragon recharges their Breath Weapon whenever they critically hit with a {@action Strike}.
bot.name: Draconic Momentum

entries: 90 feet, {@dc 37}
mid.name: Frightful Presence

entries: The dragon raises a wing, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If the dragon is Flying, they descend 10 feet after the attack.
mid.name: Wing Deflection
mid.trigger: The dragon is targeted with an attack

entries: The dragon breathes a blast of magma that deals {@damage 10d6} fire damage and {@damage 5d12} bludgeoning damage in a 60-foot cone ({@dc 40} basic Reflex save). They can't use Breath Weapon again for {@dice 1d4} rounds.
bot.name: Breath Weapon

entries: The dragon makes two claw {@action Strike||Strikes} and one horn {@action Strike} in any order.
bot.name: Draconic Frenzy

entries: The dragon recharges their Breath Weapon whenever they score a critical hit with a {@action Strike}.
bot.name: Draconic Momentum

entries: A magma dragon's swim Speed functions only when the dragon is Swimming through magma or molten lava.
bot.name: Magma Swim

entries: Once per day, the dragon can spit a molten boulder at a target within 120 feet. This deals {@damage 12d6} fire damage and {@damage 5d12} bludgeoning damage, with a {@dc 42} basic Reflex save. If the creature fails its save, it's encased in magma that instantly cools and has Hardness 10, HP 40, and BT 20.
The encased creature can't breathe and is {@condition restrained} ({@action Escape} {@dc 42}).
bot.name: Magma Tomb

entries: If the next action the dragon uses is Breath Weapon, the magma clings to those it damages. Each creature that fails its save against the Breath Weapon takes {@damage 5d6} {@condition persistent damage||persistent fire damage}, and as long as it has this {@condition persistent damage||persistent fire damage}, it also takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds.
bot.name: Volcanic Purge

abilities: +1 status to all saves vs. magic

attacks.name: jaws
attacks.damage: {@damage 4d10+18} piercing plus {@damage 4d6} negative and drain vigor

entries: 90 feet, {@dc 40}
mid.name: Frightful Presence

entries: Jaws only.
mid.name: Attack of Opportunity

entries: The umbral dragon breathes in one of two ways. They can't use Breath Weapon again for {@dice 1d4} rounds.

items: {@bold Negative} (necromancy, negative, primal) The dragon breathes a blast of darkness in a 50-foot cone that deals {@damage 21d6} negative damage ({@dc 42} basic Reflex save). Undead creatures take {@damage 25d6} force damage instead of the negative damage.

entries: {@bold Shadows} (necromancy, primal, shadow) The dragon breathes a blast of shadows in a 50-foot cone. Each creature within the cone must attempt a {@dc 42} Fortitude save.

entries.Success: The creature is {@condition enfeebled 3} for 1 round.
entries.Failure: The creature is {@condition enfeebled 3} for 1 minute.
entries.Critical Failure: The creature is {@condition enfeebled 3} for 1 minute and {@condition blinded} for 1 round.

bot.name: Breath Weapon

entries: The dragon makes two claw {@action Strike||Strikes} and one wing {@action Strike} in any order.
bot.name: Draconic Frenzy

entries: The dragon recharges their Breath Weapon whenever they score a critical hit with a {@action Strike}.
bot.name: Draconic Momentum

entries: When the dragon deals negative damage to a living creature with its jaws {@action Strike}, the umbral dragon gains 20 temporary Hit Points and the creature must succeed at a {@dc 41} Fortitude save or become {@condition enfeebled 2}. Further damage dealt by the dragon's jaws {@action Strike} increases the {@condition enfeebled} condition value by 2 on a failed save, to a maximum of {@condition enfeebled 4}.
bot.name: Drain Vigor

entries: An umbral dragon's {@action Strike||Strikes} affect incorporeal creatures with the effects of a {@item ghost touch} property rune, and an umbral dragon's jaws deal an additional {@damage 8d6} force damage to undead.
bot.name: Ghost Bane
Endless Nightmare
bot.note: An animate dream's touch fills the victim's mind with terrifying visions

stages.entry: The victim falls asleep and can't be awakened as long as they remain at this stage.

entries: For each action spent to use this ability, the ankou creates one shadowy duplicate of themself anywhere within 60 feet of themself. Shadow doubles have the same statistics as an ankou, but they have the summoned trait, have 84 Hit Points, can't use Shadow Doubles or innate spells, and have an attack bonus of +25 for their {@action Strike||Strikes}. A shadow double that attempts a saving throw against a {@trait light} effect can't get a result better than failure. Each double remains for 1 round, until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points, or until it moves further than 120 feet from the ankou, whichever comes first. Each round thereafter, the ankou can spend a single action that has the {@trait concentrate} trait to extend the duration of surviving duplicates by 1 round, to a maximum duration of 1 minute. The ankou can see through the eyes of all of the shadow doubles at once. A character who Seeks can identify an ankou as real or a shadow double with a successful {@dc 39} {@skill Perception} check.
bot.name: Shadow Doubles

entries: An ankou's {@action Strike||Strikes} deal an additional {@damage 2d6} precision damage to {@condition flat-footed} creatures.
bot.name: Sneak Attack

entries: An aolaz has an incredible sense of hearing. It can hear any sound made within 1,000 feet as though it were only 5 feet away from the source of the sound, and any sound within 1 mile as though it were only 30 feet away from the source of the sound. An aolaz's hearing is a precise sense.
top.name: Flawless Hearing

entries: The aolaz tucks its head down and rolls up into an armored sphere. While Rolling, an aolaz has AC 44, Fort +37, Ref +29, Will +33, and Speed 100 feet, but it can't use its trunk {@action Strike||Strikes} or its Ultrasonic Blast. It can make foot {@action Strike||Strikes} while rolling, but only as part of a {@ability Trample}. The aolaz can use this action again to unroll and resume its standing form.
bot.name: Roll

entries: Huge or smaller, foot, {@dc 40}
bot.name: Trample

entries: The aolaz releases a tremendous blast of sonic energy from its trunk in a 150-foot line, dealing {@damage 12d10} sonic damage. The frequency of this sound is such that it is completely imperceptible to humanoids, but the damage it wreaks is all too evident. Each creature in the area must attempt a {@dc 40} Fortitude save. The aolaz can't use Ultrasonic Blast again for {@dice 1d4} rounds.

entries.Success: The creature takes half damage and is {@condition stunned 1}.
entries.Failure: The creature takes full damage and is {@condition stunned 2}.
entries.Critical Failure: The creature takes double damage and is {@condition stunned 3}.

bot.name: Ultrasonic Blast

mid.trigger: A creature leaves the swarm's space
entries: The swarm takes {@dice 1d6} damage as ants cling to the creature and continue biting, dealing {@damage 3d6} {@condition persistent damage||persistent piercing damage}. High winds or immersion in water reduces the DC of the flat check to end this {@condition persistent damage} to 5. Any area damage dealt to the creature destroys these clinging ants.
mid.name: Cling

entries: Each enemy in the swarm's space takes {@damage 3d6} piercing damage ({@dc 21} basic Fortitude save). A creature that fails its save against Swarming Bites becomes {@condition clumsy 1} for 1 round. If the creature attempts a concentrate or manipulate action while affected, it must succeed at a DC {@flatDC 5} flat check or the action is lost; roll the check after spending the action, but before any effects are applied.
bot.name: Swarming Bites

entries: The assassin vine can {@action Hide} in natural environments even if it doesn't have cover.
top.name: Camouflage

mid.trigger: The assassin vine detects a creature within 20 feet via {@ability tremorsense}
entries: The assassin vine causes vegetation within a 20-foot emanation to writhe for 1 round, turning this area into {@quickref difficult terrain||3|terrain}. When a creature starts its turn in this area, it must attempt a {@dc 20} Reflex save. On a failure, it takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until it leaves the area, and on a critical failure it is also {@condition immobilized} for 1 round. A creature can attempt to {@action Escape} to remove these effects.
Assassin vines are immune to Grasping Foliage.
mid.name: Grasping Foliage

entries: {@damage 1d8+4} bludgeoning, {@dc 20}
bot.name: Constrict

entries: An athach gains an extra reaction at the start of each of its turns that it can use only to make an {@action Attack of Opportunity} with its claw. It can't use more than one Attack of Opportunity triggered by the same action.
mid.name: Attack of Opportunity

bot.trigger: The athach hits a creature with two fist {@action Strike||Strikes}
entries: The athach makes a claw {@action Strike} with no multiple attack penalty against the creature it hit with its fist {@action Strike||Strikes}. This claw attack does not increase the athach's multiple attack penalty.
bot.name: Swift Claw

entries: 10 feet. An attic whisperer enshrouds itself in a tapestry of stolen voices. Each living creature that enters or starts their turn in the aura must succeed at a {@dc 19} Will save or the unnerving, bitter sobs render them distraught and they become {@condition stupefied 1} for as long as they remain within the aura. A creature that succeeds is temporarily immune for 1 hour. The attic whisperer can activate or deactivate the aura with a single free action, which has the {@trait concentrate} trait.
mid.name: Aura of Sobs

mid.trigger: A creature with an active {@trait emotion} effect enters an attic whisperer's aura of sobs
entries: The attic whisperer attempts to counteract the {@trait emotion} effect, with a counteract modifier of +13.
mid.name: Whispered Despair

entries: The attic whisperer siphons the breath from living creatures, sapping their strength. A living creature hit by a jaws {@action Strike} must attempt a {@dc 21} Fortitude save.

entries.Success: The target is {@condition enfeebled 1} for 1 round.
entries.Failure: The target is {@condition enfeebled 1} for 24 hours and {@condition fatigued}.
entries.Critical Failure: The target is {@condition enfeebled 1} for 24 hours, is {@condition fatigued}, and falls {@condition unconscious}.

bot.name: Steal Breath

entries: When an attic whisperer hits a living creature with a bony hand {@action Strike}, it tries to pull the victim's voice into its aura. The victim must attempt a {@dc 21} Will save.

entries.Success: The target's voice is weak for 1 minute. Anytime it attempts an action with the {@trait auditory} trait, it must succeed at a DC {@flatDC 5} flat check or the action is lost.
entries.Failure: The target loses the ability to speak for 1 hour, until the curse is removed, or until the attic whisperer is destroyed, whichever comes first. During this time, the attic whisperer can perfectly mimic the target's voice, and the target takes a –2 circumstance penalty to saving throws against that attic whisperer's aura of sobs.
entries.Critical Failure: As failure, but the effects lasts until the attic whisperer is destroyed or the curse is removed.

bot.name: Steal Voice

attacks.name: bite
attacks.damage: {@damage 3d12+14} piercing plus {@damage 4d6} {@condition persistent damage||persistent bleed}, {@damage 1d6} chaotic, and rotting curse

attacks.name: sting
attacks.damage: {@damage 3d8+14} slashing plus {@damage 4d6} {@condition persistent damage||persistent bleed} and {@damage 1d6} chaotic

entries: The augnagar's writhing limbs and flesh seethe and squirm in a disorienting and unsettling manner. Creatures in a 30-foot emanation must attempt a {@dc 34} Will save, after which they are temporarily immune to further Confusing Displays for 1 minute.

entries.Success: The creature is {@condition stupefied 1} for 1 round.
entries.Failure: The creature is {@condition stupefied 1} and {@condition confused} for 1 minute.
entries.Critical Failure: As failure, but the creature can't attempt a flat check to recover from confusion whenever it takes damage from an attack or spell.

bot.name: Confusing Display

entries: Frequency once per day; The augnagar inhales sharply, drawing life force out of creatures in a 50-foot cone. Creatures in the area take {@damage 14d6} negative damage ({@dc 34} basic Fortitude save, and the creature is {@condition fatigued} on a failure). The augnagar becomes {@condition quickened} for 1 round on its next turn, and it can use the extra action only to {@action Stride} or {@action Strike}.
bot.name: Inhale Vitality

stages.entry: {@condition drained 2} and the creature displays hideous, festering wounds exuding a horrific stench.

entries: A velstrac automatically knows whether a creature it sees has any of the {@condition doomed}, {@condition dying}, and {@condition wounded} conditions, as well as the value of those conditions.
top.name: Painsight

entries: 30 feet. When a creature ends its turn in the aura, it feels the sharp barbs of the augur's blades on its skin. The creature must succeed at a {@dc 17} Will save or become {@condition frightened 1} ({@condition frightened 2} on a critical failure).
mid.name: Feel the Blades

entries: The augur stares at a creature they can see within 30 feet. The target must immediately attempt a Will save against feel the blades. After attempting this save, the creature is then temporarily immune until the start of the augur's next turn.
bot.name: Focus Gaze

entries: The augur Flies or {@action Stride||Strides}, whirling as they move. The augur deals the damage of their blade {@action Strike} to each creature whose space they enter ({@dc 16} basic Reflex save). Each creature is affected only once, even if the augur moves through its space multiple times.
bot.name: Whirling Slice

entries: An aurumvorax gains a +4 circumstance bonus to its Fortitude or Reflex DC against {@action Shove} and {@action Trip} attempts, and to its {@skill Athletics} DC against attempts to escape its Grab.
mid.name: Tenacious Stance

entries: When an aurumvorax scores a critical hit, the target takes {@damage 1d6} {@condition persistent damage||persistent bleed damage}.
bot.name: Bleeding Critical

entries: The aurumvorax makes a jaws {@action Strike} against a creature it has {@condition grabbed}. If the attack hits, the target is knocked {@condition prone} if it is Medium or smaller. In addition, if the target is wearing armor with Hardness 10 or lower, the armor becomes {@condition broken}. If this {@action Strike} breaks a creature's armor or damages a creature that is unarmored or wearing {@condition broken} armor, the target also takes {@damage 1d6} {@condition persistent damage||persistent bleed damage}. This {@action Strike} doesn't further damage armor that's already {@condition broken}.
bot.name: Gnaw Metal

entries: The aurumvorax makes four claw {@action Strike||Strikes} against a creature it has {@condition grabbed}. Each attack counts toward the aurumvorax's multiple attack penalty, and the multiple attack penalty increases with each attack.
bot.name: Rapid Rake

entries: An Azuretzi can anticipate the most likely location of a creature through their supernatural insight into the forces of chaotic probabilities and chance. This grants the azuretzi the ability to sense creatures within the listed range. A creature under the effects of nondetection or that is otherwise shielded from divinations and predictions cannot be noticed via entropy sense.
top.name: Entropy Sense

entries: An azuretzi's vital organs shift and change shape and position constantly. Immediately after the azuretzi takes acid, electricity, or sonic damage, it gains the listed amount of resistance to that damage type. This lasts for 1 hour or until the next time the protean takes damage of one of the other types (in which case its resistance changes to match that type), whichever comes first.

The azuretzi is immune to {@trait polymorph} effects unless it is a willing target. If {@condition blinded} or {@condition deafened}, the akizendri automatically recovers at the end of its next turn as new sensory organs grow to replace the compromised ones.
mid.name: Protean Anatomy

mid.trigger: A creature with an active spell effect within 30 feet of the azuretzi fails to resist another azuretzi's Mocking Touch
entries: The azuretzi attempts to counteract one ongoing spell effect on the target creature with a {@skill Thievery} check. If it is successful, it transfers the ongoing spell effect to itself. The creature then becomes temporarily immune to Spell Pilfer for 24 hours.
mid.name: Spell Pilfer

entries: {@damage 1d12+4} bludgeoning, {@dc 22}
bot.name: Constrict

entries: As {@ability Change Shape}, but an azuretzi can assume the specific form of a Medium or smaller creature it {@action Seek||Seeks} with a successful {@dc 25}.
bot.name: Mimic Form

entries: The azuretzi mocks a creature's magical ability with a touch. The azuretzi must attempt a {@skill Thievery} check against the target's Will DC.

entries.Critical Success: The azuretzi chooses one spell of up to 3rd level that the target creature has available to cast. The azuretzi gains that spell as a mock divine innate spell, and it can cast that spell once as an innate divine spell using its own DC and spell attack. It must do so before 24 hours pass or the mock spell is lost. The creature touched cannot cast the mock spell until the azuretzi casts it first or the 24 hour period passes, whichever comes first.
entries.Success: As critical success, but the azuretzi has 1 hour to cast the mock spell before it is lost, and the creature touched can cast the spell normally.
entries.Failure: As critical success, but the azuretzi must cast the mock spell before the end of its next turn or it is lost, and the creature touched can cast the spell normally.
entries.Critical Failure: Mocking Touch has no effect.

bot.name: Mocking Touch

entries: Babaus revel in gore, and when wounds are healed, they recoil in pain. When a creature heals from damage that the babau dealt on their last turn with Grievous {@action Strike}, sneak attack, or a critical hit, the demon takes {@damage 4d6} mental damage. The babau can take this mental damage only once per round.
mid.name: Mercy Vulnerability

mid.trigger: A creature within the babau's reach successfully hits the babau with a {@action Strike}
entries: The babau excretes a gout of acidic, bloodlike slime against the attacker and its weapon. The attacker must attempt a {@dc 24} Reflex save.

entries.Success: The attacker takes {@damage 1d6} acid damage.
entries.Failure: The attacker takes {@damage 2d6} acid damage.
entries.Critical Failure: As failure, except the weapon used to {@action Strike} the babau becomes {@condition broken}, unless the weapon is made of a material that is immune to acid.

mid.name: Reactive Slime

entries: The babau attacks with the intent of creating a particularly horrific and gory wound. The babau makes a melee {@action Strike}. This counts as two attacks when calculating the daemon's multiple attack penalty. If this {@action Strike} hits, the babau deals an additional {@dice 2d6} damage of the same damage type, and the creature struck is {@condition frightened 2}.
bot.name: Grievous Strike

entries: The babau's {@action Strike||Strikes} deal an extra {@damage 2d6} precision damage to {@condition flat-footed} creatures.
Rituals like planar ally or planar binding are typical for long-term ends, and summon fiend for combat applications. For planar ally, demons.
bot.name: Sneak Attack

entries: The baobhan sith sways rhythmically and {@action Stride||Strides} up to their Speed.
Each creature within 30 feet of the baobhan sith at the end of their movement must attempt a {@dc 25} Will save.

entries.Critical Success: The creature is unaffected and is temporarily immune to Captivating Dance for 24 hours.
entries.Success: The creature is {@condition slowed 1} for 1 round and is temporarily immune to Captivating Dance for 24 hours.
entries.Failure: The creature is {@condition fascinated}, and it must spend at least 1 of its actions on each of its turns to move closer to the baobhan sith as expediently as possible, while avoiding obvious dangers. If the creature ends its movement or turn adjacent to the fey, it is {@condition slowed 1} until the end of its next turn.
entries.Critical Failure: As failure, but the creature must spend each of its actions moving closer to the baobhan sith, and if it ends its movement or turn adjacent to the fey, it is {@condition paralyzed} until the end of its next turn.

bot.name: Captivating Dance

entries: The baobhan sith can transform into a large raven, with the effects from the bird option in the {@spell aerial form} spell (Core Rulebook 316).
bot.name: Change Shape

bot.requirements: A bleeding creature is within the baobhan sith's reach
entries: The baobhan sith tries to Drink the Blood from the bleeding creature's wounds. The baobhan sith attempts an {@skill Athletics} check against the victim's Fortitude DC. On a success, the victim becomes {@condition drained 1} and the baobhan sith regains 10 HP, gaining any Hit Points in excess of their maximum Hit Points as temporary Hit Points. Drinking Blood from a victim that's already {@condition drained} doesn't restore any Hit Points to the baobhan sith but increases the victim's {@condition drained} value by 1. A victim's {@condition drained} condition decreases by 1 per week. A blood transfusion, which requires 10 minutes, a successful {@dc 20} {@skill Medicine} check, and sufficient blood or a blood donor, reduces the {@condition drained} value by 1.
bot.name: Drink Blood

entries: Although a basidirond is immune to cold damage, any effect that deals cold damage causes it to become {@condition slowed 1} for {@dice 1d4} rounds. During this time, it cannot use its Hallucinogenic Cloud or basidirond spores.
mid.name: Cold Lethargy

entries: The basidirond releases a cloud of {@condition invisible} spores in a 20-foot emanation.

Each creature in the area must succeed at a {@dc 22} Fortitude save or experience powerful hallucinations as long as it remains in the cloud, plus an additional {@dice 1d4} rounds after leaving the area. A creature must attempt a new save each round it remains within the area. The cloud persists for 5 rounds unless dispersed before then by a strong wind. Each hallucinating creature rolls {@dice 1d6} each round to determine what it hallucinates that round.
1 The target is sinking in quicksand. It falls {@condition prone} and spends 1 action on its next turn flailing its limbs as if attempting to swim.

2 The target is attacked by a swarm of spiders. It spends 2 actions on its next turn attacking the floor with a melee weapon (drawing a weapon if needed). It is {@condition flat-footed} against all attacks.
3 An item the target is holding turns into a viper. The target Releases the item and spends its next turn {@condition fleeing} from it.
4 The target is suffocating. It holds its breath and is {@condition stunned 3}.
5 The target shrinks to 1/10 its normal size. For 1 round it is {@condition slowed 2} and {@condition enfeebled 4}, and takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speed.
6 The target is melting. It drops everything it's holding and becomes {@condition slowed 2} and {@condition clumsy 4} for 1 round.
bot.name: Hallucinogenic Cloud

entries: 50 feet. All good-aligned creatures in the aura have fast healing 30 for as long as they remain in range, and they gain a +2 status bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls.
mid.name: Bastion Aura

entries: If the bastion archon is slain by an evil creature, it explodes in a geyser of holy light, restoring 140 HP to all good-aligned creatures in a 40-foot emanation. The ground in the affected area is also subjected to a level 10 consecrate ritual, and the ground is consecrated for 10 years (or only 24 hours if the ultimate sacrifice took place in Hell, Abaddon, or the Abyss).
mid.name: Ultimate Sacrifice

entries: Once per day, if an archon sees another creature cast {@spell dimension door}, the archon can use dimension door (heightened to 5th level) within 1 round to attempt to follow that creature to the maximum distance of the archon's dimension door. If the archon's dimension door has enough distance, the archon appears the same distance and direction from the creature as before either creature used dimension door.
bot.name: Archon's Door

bot.trigger: The bastion archon hits a creature with two fist {@action Strike||Strikes} this turn and can use its Holy Beam;
entries: The bastion archon fires its Holy Beam at only the creature it hit twice. The creature's save result is one degree of success worse than the result it rolled.
bot.name: Blinding Beams

entries: The bastion archon locks itself in place, becoming voluntarily {@condition immobilized}. While Entrenched, the archon can't be forcibly moved or tripped, and it gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and Reflex saves. Entrench ends automatically as soon as the bastion archon uses another move action.
bot.name: Entrench

entries: The bastion archon releases a blinding beam of holy light in a 500-foot line that deals {@damage 20d6} good damage to non-archons in the area, with a {@dc 38} Reflex save. The bastion archon can't use Holy Beam again for {@dice 1d4} rounds.

entries.Success: The creature takes half damage.
entries.Failure: The creature takes full damage and is {@condition blinded} for {@dice 1d4} rounds.
entries.Critical Failure: The creature takes double damage and is {@condition blinded} permanently.

bot.name: Holy Beam

entries: A bebilith can smell demons as a precise sense.
top.name: Scent Demons

bot.name: Abyssal Rot
bot.note: The {@condition drained} condition from Abyssal rot is cumulative, to a maximum of {@condition drained 4}

entries: A creature hit by the bebilith's web {@action Strike} is {@condition restrained} and tethered to the bebilith, preventing it from moving further away from the bebilith. The {@condition restrained} creature is also under the effects of a {@spell dimensional anchor} spell ({@dc 29}) with a duration that lasts as long as the creature remains tethered. The bebilith can have only one creature tethered at a time. The DC to {@action Escape} or {@action Force Open} the tether is 29. The tether can be severed with a {@action Strike} (AC 20, Hardness 2, HP 20); this ends the dimensional anchor effect but does not free the {@condition restrained} creature.
bot.name: Dimensional Tether

entries: Against demons, a bebilith's {@action Strike||Strikes} count as cold iron and good.
bot.name: Penetrating Strike

entries: The behemoth hippopotamus can hold its breath for 1 hour.
top.name: Deep Breath

entries: 40 feet
bot.name: Aquatic Ambush

entries: As hippopotamus ({@dc 30} for a Huge vessel).
bot.name: Capsize

entries: The behemoth hippo makes a jaws {@action Strike} targeting two creatures adjacent to each other. Roll the attack and damage once, and apply it to each creature separately.
bot.name: Double Chomp

entries: Chomp counts as two attacks for the multiple attack penalty.
bot.name: An Engulfing

entries: Medium, {@damage 2d12+10} bludgeoning, Rupture 26.
bot.name: Swallow Whole

entries: Large or smaller, foot, {@dc 29}
bot.name: Trample

entries: The behir breathes lightning that deals {@damage 9d6} electricity damage in an 60-foot line ({@dc 27} basic Reflex save). It can't use Breath Weapon again for {@dice 1d4} rounds.
bot.name: Breath Weapon

entries: The behir {@action Stride||Strides} up to its Speed, during which it can walk on air as if it were solid ground, ascending or descending at up to a 45-degree angle. It can make up to four claw {@action Strike||Strikes} at any point during this movement, each against a different target within reach, and it deals an extra {@damage 1d6} electricity damage with each {@action Strike}. These attacks count toward the behir's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after the behir makes all of its attacks.
If the behir moves half its Speed or less during a Claw Storm, that movement doesn't trigger reactions. The behir can't use Claw Storm if it has a creature wrapped in its coils.

At the end of Claw Storm, it drifts downward up to 60 feet to the ground, landing softly and taking no damage from the fall. If it descends further than 60 feet, it takes damage normally from the remaining fall.
bot.name: Claw Storm

entries: {@damage 2d6+7} bludgeoning, {@dc 27}
bot.name: Constrict

entries: Large, {@damage 2d12+7} bludgeoning, Rupture 21.
bot.name: Swallow Whole

bot.requirements: The behir has a creature either {@condition restrained} or {@condition grabbed} in its jaws
entries: The behir moves the creature into its coils, freeing its jaws. The creature remains {@condition grabbed} and takes {@damage 1d6+6} slashing damage. The behir's coils can hold as many creatures as will fit in its space.
bot.name: Wrap in Coils

entries: The belker ignores the {@condition concealed} condition from smoke.
top.name: Smoke Vision

entries: The belker can occupy the same space as other creatures.
mid.name: Smoke Form

bot.requirements: The belker occupies the same space as a Medium or smaller creature
entries: The belker attempts to flow into the creature's lungs; the creature must attempt a {@dc 23} Fortitude save. On a failure, the creature partially inhales the belker and is {@condition immobilized} by the pain of the smoke rasping in its throat and lungs. The creature can attempt to exhale the belker by spending an action coughing and succeeding at a {@dc 23} Fortitude save. Most of the belker remains outside the creature, so the belker can still act normally. If the belker moves out of the creature's space or uses Noxious Fumes again, the creature automatically exhales it.
bot.name: Noxious Fumes

bot.requirements: The belker is partially inhaled by a creature
entries: The belker automatically deals its claw damage to the inhaling creature by forming a claw to slash and scrape the creature from within.
bot.name: Smoke Slash

entries: The black bear gains +1 circumstance bonus to damage rolls against creatures it has {@condition grabbed}.
bot.name: Mauler

entries: {@damage 2d12+12} bludgeoning, {@dc 36}
bot.name: Greater Constrict

entries: The black scorpion makes three stinger {@action Strike||Strikes}, each against a different target. Its multiple attack penalty applies to each attack, but the penalty increases only after all the attacks have been made.
bot.name: Rapid Stinging

entries: Bright light shines from the blindheim's eyes in a 30-foot emanation (also creating dim light to 60 feet). Each creature in the bright light when the blindheim uses this action, or who enters it while the light continues, must attempt a {@dc 18} Fortitude save. It is then temporarily immune for 1 hour. This light remains until the blindheim dims its eyes by using this action again.

entries.Success: The creature is {@condition dazzled} for 1 round.
entries.Failure: The creature is {@condition blinded} for {@dice 1d4} rounds.
entries.Critical Failure: The creature is {@condition blinded} for 1 hour.

bot.name: Spotlight

entries: The blink dog's {@action Strike||Strikes} deal an additional {@dice 1d4} damage to creatures within the reach of at least two of the blink dog's allies.
bot.name: Pack Attack

entries: The blizzardborn ignores the {@condition concealed} condition from falling snow.
top.name: Snow Vision

mid.trigger: An enemy hits the blizzardborn with an attack that deals physical damage
entries: A portion of the blizzardborn's body shatters into an explosion of razor sharp ice crystals and blinding snow that deals {@damage 2d6} piercing damage to opponents in a 5-foot emanation ({@dc 24} basic Reflex save). Anyone who fails is also {@condition blinded} for 1 round (or 3 rounds on a critical failure).
mid.name: Shattering Ice

entries: The blizzardborn can {@action Burrow} through ice or snow with a.
bot.name: Ice Burrow

entries: A blodeuwedd exudes a 30-foot aura of pollen and irritating allergens.
